description: Blog post scheduling config. Posts are stored as .html files in /blog/drafts/, then moved to /blog/ on scheduled publish date.

instructions.workflow: 1. Write post in /blog/drafts/ as {slug}.html 2. Add entry to this JSON with publish_date 3. Cron job or manual deploy checks this file daily 4. When date arrives, moves post to /blog/ and updates index
instructions.publish_immediately: Set publish_date to today or leave empty to publish now
